title: b9193
description: server : honor --embd-normalize CLI arg ( #23125 ) The --embd-normalize flag was registered only for the embedding and debug examples, so llama-server rejected it and the /embedding handler used a hard-coded default of 2 (L2). Add LLAMA_EXAMPLE_SERVER to the flag's example set and read params.embd_normalize as the handler's default.
